title: Bedrolls
description: Adds bedrolls to the game. When placed on the ground sets the players spawnpoint without the need to sleep in it.
body:
# Bedrolls
Bedrolls is a mod that adds a single item/block - the bedroll. When placed on the ground the player's spawnpoint will be immediately set to that location without the need to sleep in it. 

In fact you cannot sleep in this, right clicking a preexisting bedroll will simply set your spawnpoint to its location. The idea for this mod is to disable the crafting of beds and opt to use bedrolls instead. This mod has a very specific use case.

### Inspiration
The concept for this mod came from my modpack, which disables sleeping. Doing so I had issues with allowing players to still set their spawnpoint using a bed. So thus I created a custom bedroll to provide similar functionality.

### Known Limitations
As of the latest version of this mod, when breaking a bedroll the player's spawn will not be reset to the world spawn.

### Credits
- Concept inspired by Conan Exiles
